scheme_name: Marriage Grant to Orphan Daughter of Ex-Servicemen
page_title: Marriage Grant to Orphan Daughter of Ex-Servicemen

details: The "Marriage Grant to Orphan Daughter of Ex-Servicemen" scheme is implemented by the Sainik and Ardh Sainik Welfare Department, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹51,000/- is provided for the marriage of each dependent orphan daughter of an ex-serviceman, for up to two daughters, who are at least 18 years old.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹51,000/‐ is given for the marriage of orphan daughters of ex-servicemen.
eligibility: The applicant should be a bona fide resident of Haryana.
The applicant should be a dependent orphan daughter of an ex-serviceman.
The orphan daughter should be at least 18 years old.
Assistance is available for up to two orphan daughters of an ex-serviceman.

online: Registration Process on Antyodaya-SARAL Portal:
Step 1:
The eligible applicant may apply online through the Official Portal-
Antyodaya-SARAL Portal
Step 2:
If the applicant is not registered on the portal, he/she gets registered there.
Step 3:
For registration, click “
New User
” under ‘Sign In Here’ and fill in all the mandatory details i.e. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number, Password & State. Click on ‘Submit’.
Step 4
: Verify your mobile number and email ID through the received OTP and complete the registration process.
Login to apply for the scheme:
To avail the benefits of the scheme, visit the Official
and log in through the email ID used while registering.
Enter Password & Captcha and click on ‘Login’.
After successful login, click on ‘Apply for Services’ and then ‘View all Available Services’.
Step 4:
Now, you can search for the scheme and download the pre-defined documents form/template and you will need to upload the filled-in/signed form/template in the 'Attach Enclosures' screen.
Step 5:

Click on ‘Proceed to Apply’ to fill out the application form. Enter your Parivar Pehchan Patra number- Family ID and click on “Click here to Fetch Family Data” which displays the family members registered under the given Family ID.
Step 6:
Select the beneficiary/applicant name and enter the OTP that is being sent to the selected family member for verification. Click on “Click to Verify”
Step 7:
Fill in all the mandatory details and upload all the mandatory documents.
Step 8:
Preview the application form and click on ‘Submit’.
Tracking of Application:
Applicants can track their applications through the Official
by entering their Department Name, Scheme Name, and Application Reference ID.

documents_required: Copy of Identity Card of Ex-serviceman
Copy of Bank Passbook linked with Aadhaar Card
Applicant’s Photo ID Proof (Ration Card/Driving Licence/ Voter ID Card/PAN Card etc.)
Age Proof- Matric Exam Certificate for Date of Birth verification (attested)
Death certificate of Mother and Father

faqs.question: What is the financial assistance amount provided under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme provides ₹51,000/- for the marriage of each dependent orphan daughter of an ex-serviceman.

faqs.question: How many orphan daughters can benefit from this scheme?
faqs.answer: Assistance is available for up to two orphan daughters of an ex-serviceman.

faqs.question: What is the minimum age requirement for the orphan daughter to receive the grant?
faqs.answer: The orphan daughter must be at least 18 years old to receive the grant.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for the scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant must be a bonafide resident of Haryana and a dependent orphan daughter of an ex-serviceman who is at least 18 years old.

faqs.question: How can eligible applicants apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Eligible applicants can apply online through the Official Antyodaya-SARAL Portal at https://saralharyana.gov.in/.

faqs.question: Is there a specific portal to track the application status?
faqs.answer: Yes, applicants can track their application status through the Official Antyodaya-SARAL Portal at https://status.saralharyana.nic.in/

faqs.question: Can the grant be claimed for more than two daughters?
